Name: FBuildPromotionImportWorkflowSettings
Description: Holds settings for the import workflow stage of the build promotion test

Variables.Name: Diffuse
Variables.Description: Import settings for the Diffuse texture

Variables.Name: Normal
Variables.Description: Import settings for the Normalmap texture

Variables.Name: StaticMesh
Variables.Description: Import settings for the static mesh

Variables.Name: ReimportStaticMesh
Variables.Description: Import settings for the static mesh to re-import

Variables.Name: BlendShapeMesh
Variables.Description: Import settings for the blend shape

Variables.Name: MorphMesh
Variables.Description: Import settings for the morph mesh

Variables.Name: SkeletalMesh
Variables.Description: Import settings for the skeletal mesh

Variables.Name: Animation
Variables.Description: Import settings for the animation asset.  (Will automatically use the skeleton of the skeletal mesh above)

Variables.Name: SurroundSound
Variables.Description: Import settings for the surround sound (Select any of the channels.  It will auto import the rest)

Variables.Name: OtherAssetsToImport
Variables.Description: Import settings for any other assets you may want to import
